records.question: Which documents have a status of currently working on, a receipt date on or after 1996-07-27 03:30:40, receipt number 189, and other details exactly x?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40' AND documents.receipt_number = '189' AND documents.other_details = 'x'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Status ON Documents.document_status_code = Ref_Document_Status.document_status_code
WHERE Ref_Document_Status.document_status_description = 'currently working on'
  AND Documents.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40'
  AND Documents.receipt_number = '189'
  AND Documents.other_details = 'x'

records.question: Which documents have receipt number 124 and receipt date 1999-04-17 14:19:32, have other details as b, are currently working on status, were mailed on or before 1971-11-03 12:32:14, and were handled by Fedex with shipping agent description k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN documents_mailed ON documents.document_id = documents_mailed.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex' AND documents.other_details = 'b' AND ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND documents_mailed.mailing_date <= '1971-11-03 12:32:14' AND documents.receipt_number = '124' AND documents.receipt_date = '1999-04-17 14:19:32' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Status ON Documents.document_status_code = Ref_Document_Status.document_status_code
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN Documents_Mailed ON Documents.document_id = Documents_Mailed.document_id
WHERE Documents.receipt_number = '124'
  AND Documents.receipt_date = '1999-04-17 14:19:32'
  AND Documents.other_details = 'b'
  AND Ref_Document_Status.document_status_description = 'working on'
  AND Documents_Mailed.mailing_date <= '1971-11-03 12:32:14'
  AND Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex'
  AND Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k'

records.question: Which documents have a type description of b, are handled by UPS with a shipping agent description of g, have other details exactly as z, and have draft details exactly as k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'b' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'UPS' AND documents.other_details = 'z' AND document_drafts.draft_details = 'k'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types ON Documents.document_type_code = Ref_Document_Types.document_type_code
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN Document_Drafts ON Documents.document_id = Document_Drafts.document_id
WHERE Ref_Document_Types.document_type_description = 'b'
  AND Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_name = 'UPS'
  AND Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g'
  AND Documents.other_details = 'z'
  AND Document_Drafts.draft_details = 'k'

records.question: Which documents have a document type of f, shipping agent k, receipt number of 114, other details of j, and a receipt date on or before 2005-09-30 00:10:02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'f' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k' AND documents.receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02' AND documents.receipt_number = '114' AND documents.other_details = 'j'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT document_id
FROM Documents
WHERE document_type_code = 'f'
  AND shipping_agent_code = 'k'
  AND receipt_number = '114'
  AND other_details = 'j'
  AND receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02'

records.question: Which documents have a receipt number exactly 55, other details exactly p, and were received on or after 1983-09-26 09:32:56?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
WHERE documents.receipt_date >= '1983-09-26 09:32:56' AND documents.receipt_number = '55' AND documents.other_details = 'p'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT document_id
FROM Documents
WHERE receipt_number = '55'
  AND other_details = 'p'
  AND receipt_date >= '1983-09-26 09:32:56'

records.question: Which documents were handled by the shipping agent USPS and have associated drafts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN Document_Drafts ON Documents.document_id = Document_Drafts.document_id
WHERE Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'

records.question: Which documents with receipt number 80 and other details exactly q were mailed using USPS with description q on or after 1973-11-05 21:48:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'mailed' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'q' AND documents.receipt_number = '80' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND documents.other_details = 'q'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN Documents_Mailed ON Documents.document_id = Documents_Mailed.document_id
WHERE Documents.receipt_number = '80'
  AND Documents.other_details = 'q'
  AND Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
  AND Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_description = 'q'
  AND Documents_Mailed.mailing_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53'
